title: Jammu University Result 2026 Declared for Multiple UG Semesters

detail.title: Jammu University Result 2026 Declared for Multiple UG Semesters
detail.short_info: Jammu University Result 2026 released for UG 1st, 5th, 6th semesters & more in February. Check your marks online at coeju.com using roll number – direct links & steps inside.

sections.heading: Jammu University Result 2026 Declared for Multiple UG Semesters

content.text: Jammu University Result 2026 has been announced for various undergraduate courses including 1st, 5th, and 6th semester exams across multiple sessions. The Controller of Examinations, University of Jammu, released these updates on February 12 and 13, 2026 through official notifications on the COE portal.
Students from BA, BSc, BCom, BBA, BCA, paramedical, and other programs can now access their marks online using their roll number.

rows: BA/BSc/BSc Home Science/BCom/BBA/BCA/Hons. Semester V Exam 2025 (Regular & Private)
BSc Allied & Health Care Paramedical 1st Year (Subsequent) Exam 2025

sections.heading: How to Check Jammu University Result 2026 Online

content.text: Follow these steps to check your individual marksheet:

items: Visit the official Controller of Examinations portal: Click Here
Open the UG semester marksheet page
Enter your Roll Number and submit
Your marksheet will appear – download and save it

content.text: If your result does not load, verify your roll number or try again after some time due to heavy traffic.

sections.heading: Important Links for Jammu University Results
